name: Jongmin Choi
title: MS Student in Multimodal AI
university: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST)
bio:
I am an MS student at KAIST, working in the Multimodal AI Lab. My research focuses on multimodal representation learning, with a particular interest in audio-visual language models, modality gap mitigation, and interpretable neural computation.

I aim to build multimodal systems that are not only capable, but also more interpretable, efficient, and aligned with human understanding.
